_comment: Wires the BDD tier into the Stryker kill matrix (polly#BDD). Stryker mutates the example's own handlers; the `command` runner re-runs the Gherkin scenarios (`polly bdd run`, which exits non-zero on any failure) against each mutant. A mutant in a BDD-covered behaviour gets killed; a survivor in an uncovered handler (e.g. SET_THEME, TODO_SET_LIMIT, GET_*) is the weak-coverage signal — the mechanical complement to `polly bdd check`'s negative-complement warning. coverageAnalysis is off because the command runner has no per-test hooks, so every mutant runs the full suite.
